mapper.sql: select a.assign_id, a.target_type, a.target_id, case when a.target_type = 'contract_dept' then d.dept_name when a.target_type = 'independent_customer' then c.customer_name end as target_name, a.owner_user_id, u.user_name as owner_user_name, a.owner_dept_id, od.dept_name as owner_dept_name, a.status, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark from fe_visit_owner_assign a left join sys_user u on a.owner_user_id = u.user_id left join sys_dept od on a.owner_dept_id = od.dept_id left join sys_dept d on a.target_type = 'contract_dept' and a.target_id = d.dept_id left join fe_visit_customer c on a.target_type = 'independent_customer' and a.target_id = c.customer_id
mapper.select: select count(1) from fe_visit_owner_assign where owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId} and status = '0'
mapper.update: update fe_visit_owner_assign set target_type = #{targetType}, target_id = #{targetId}, owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId}, owner_dept_id = #{ownerDeptId}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} where assign_id = #{assignId}
